interpretation: Comparing the LA pure-vowel signs' recovery under PACKED inscriptions (the regime all prior LA analyses used) vs the AVAILABLE GORILA WORD segmentation. If word units rank the 5 vowels (A,I,U,E,O) higher, the segmentation half of the obstacle is partially addressable NOW, on existing data, without new excavation. Non-circular: vowel identities are the check, not model inputs (features are word-position stats).
